assessor_1_raw:

Temporal split with 3-month gap is correctly motivated. Equal tuning. Intermediate baseline for capacity ablation. No violations.

Verdict: defense_wins

## Independent Assessment 2 (Run 3): Credit Card Delinquency

Design is sound. Per-account normalization is within-window. Gap prevents label leakage. Bureau features at prediction time are appropriate. Verdict: defense_wins.

Strong design with careful leakage prevention. 3-month gap is a notable methodological strength. Equal optimization for both models. Verdict: defense_wins.
